data_description.year: Birth year / wedding year — used to calculate age. Leave empty if not relevant.
data_description.soon: The event is marked as upcoming when this many days remain.
data_description.recurring: On = repeats every year (birthdays, anniversaries). Off = skipped once the date has passed.
data_description.disabled: On = this event is ignored until re-enabled.

data_description.num_sensors: How many slot sensors to create. They always show the next N upcoming events, sorted with the soonest first.
